data.body: AI outputs look authoritative. Agents present data with confidence even if it's a total fabrication. Confidence in an AI output should be proportional to confidence in the data behind it. That means knowing where it came from and when it was last validated. The interface doesn't tell you that.

data.body: Random fun fact! Bricklink does not recognize the sea green colour of Jaller & Hahli Inika's Zamor Spheres exists, and erroneously lists them as having trans neon green.
